---
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    text_representation:
      extension: .qmd
      format_name: quarto
      format_version: '1.0'
      jupytext_version: 1.19.3
  kernelspec:
    display_name: Python 3 (ipykernel)
    language: python
    name: python3
---

```{python}
import ee

try:
    ee.Initialize()
except Exception:
    ee.Authenticate()
    ee.Initialize()
```

```{python}
countries = ee.FeatureCollection("USDOS/LSIB_SIMPLE/2017")

belize = countries.filter(
    ee.Filter.eq("country_na", "Belize")
).geometry()

# Optional: expand offshore to approximate EEZ / marine zone
belize_marine = belize.buffer(50000)  # 50 km offshore buffer
```

```{python}
YEAR = 2024
START = f"{YEAR}-01-01"
END   = f"{YEAR}-12-31"

s2 = (
    ee.ImageCollection("COPERNICUS/S2_SR_HARMONIZED")
    .filterDate(START, END)
    .filterBounds(belize_marine)
    .filter(ee.Filter.lt("CLOUDY_PIXEL_PERCENTAGE", 60))
)
```

```{python}
def mask_s2(img):
    scl = img.select("SCL")

    # Keep: vegetation, bare soil, water
    mask = (
        scl.eq(4)  # vegetation
        .Or(scl.eq(5))  # bare soil
        .Or(scl.eq(6))  # water
        .Or(scl.eq(7))  # unclassified (sometimes useful in coastal zones)
    )

    return (
        img.updateMask(mask)
        .divide(10000)
        .select(["B2", "B3", "B4"])
        .copyProperties(img, img.propertyNames())
    )

s2_clean = s2.map(mask_s2)
```

```{python}
mosaic = s2_clean.median().clip(belize_marine)

print("Image count:", s2_clean.size().getInfo())
```

```{python}
import requests
from PIL import Image
from io import BytesIO
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

vis = {
    "bands": ["B4", "B3", "B2"],
    "min": 0.02,
    "max": 0.25,
    "gamma": 1.2
}

thumb = mosaic.visualize(**vis)

url = thumb.getThumbURL({
    "region": belize_marine,
    "dimensions": 2500,
    "format": "png"
})

img = Image.open(BytesIO(requests.get(url).content))

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 10))
plt.imshow(img)
plt.axis("off")
plt.title(f"Belize Sentinel-2 True Color Mosaic ({YEAR})")
```

```{python}
# check for any errors from GEE API
import requests

resp = requests.get(url)

print(resp.status_code)
print(resp.text[:500])  # important
```
